jcr:root.jcr:title: About Flower Power
jcr:root.jcr:description: Learn about our vibrant design philosophy

intro.headline: About This Project
intro.text: Flower Power is more than just a pretty face — it's a fully-functional demonstration of modern web development patterns, built on Apache Sling with a playful, flower-themed design system.

technology.headline: Technology Stack
technology.text:
Backend

  • Apache Sling: Content-driven application framework
  • OSGi: Modular Java runtime
  • JCR: Java Content Repository for hierarchical data

Frontend

  • HTL (Sightly): HTML Template Language
  • TypeScript: Type-safe JavaScript
  • Modern CSS: OKLCH colors, native nesting, CSS Grid
  • HTMX: Hypermedia-driven interactions
  • Tiptap: Rich-text inline editing

philosophy.headline: Design Philosophy
philosophy.text:
Like a well-tended garden, good design requires patience, attention to detail, and a willingness to let things grow organically. Our OKLCH color system ensures visual harmony across all hues, while CSS animations bring movement and life to every interaction.

'The Earth laughs in flowers.' — Ralph Waldo Emerson

We took that sentiment seriously. Every color, every animation, every interaction is designed to spark a moment of delight.

footer.col1Content: A demonstration of vibrant design patterns, built with Apache Sling and modern frontend technologies.
footer.col3Content: Built with 🌸 by the Flower Power team.
footer.copyright: © 2025 Flower Power. A Slingslop demonstration project. All rights reserved.
